languages.text: "Жалкие попытки скрыть засаду не обманут меня, ксенос".
"Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."
languages.original_text: "Жалкие попытки скрыть засаду не обманут меня, ксенос".

traits.locale_text: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."
"Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."
"Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."

languages.text: “这种拙劣的伏击伪装骗不了我，异形。”
languages.original_text: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."

traits.locale_text: “这种拙劣的伏击伪装骗不了我，异形。”

languages.text: «No me engañarás con tus tristes intentos de emboscada, xenos».
languages.original_text: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."

traits.locale_text: «No me engañarás con tus tristes intentos de emboscada, xenos».

languages.text: « Je vois clair dans vos misérables tentatives de masquer une embuscade, xénos. »
languages.original_text: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois clair dans vos misérables tentatives de masquer une embuscade, xénos. »

languages.text: "Pusuyu gizlemeye yönelik acınası girişimlerin bana sökmez zeno."
languages.original_text: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Pusuyu gizlemeye yönelik acınası girişimlerin bana sökmez zeno."

languages.text: "Eure armselige Versuche, einen Hinterhalt zu verbergen, täuschen mich nicht, Xenos."
languages.original_text: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Eure armselige Versuche, einen Hinterhalt zu verbergen, täuschen mich nicht, Xenos."

languages.text: 「待ち伏せを隠すような哀れな試みは、私をだますことはできない、異種族」
languages.original_text: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."

traits.locale_text: 「待ち伏せを隠すような哀れな試みは、私をだますことはできません、異種族。」
